abstract: Locates and assigns the preference pane’s main view from the nib file loaded by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()].
overview:
## Discussion

The default implementation sets the receiver’s main view to the content view of the window referenced by the `_window` outlet. Before returning, [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/assignMainView()] releases the window and sets the `_window` outlet to `nil`. Returns the main view if successful, `nil` otherwise.

Override this method if your main view is located in the nib file loaded by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()], but is not the content view of a window in the file. Call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the main view of the preference pane before returning. Also call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], and [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the initial, first, and last keyboard focus views, respectively.

# assignMainView()

**Instance Method**

Locates and assigns the preference pane’s main view from the nib file loaded by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()].

## Declaration

```swift
func assignMainView()
```

## Discussion

The default implementation sets the receiver’s main view to the content view of the window referenced by the `_window` outlet. Before returning, [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/assignMainView()] releases the window and sets the `_window` outlet to `nil`. Returns the main view if successful, `nil` otherwise.

Override this method if your main view is located in the nib file loaded by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()], but is not the content view of a window in the file. Call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the main view of the preference pane before returning. Also call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], and [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the initial, first, and last keyboard focus views, respectively.

## Loading the Main View

- **loadMainView()**: Loads the preference pane’s user interface into its main view.
- **mainViewDidLoad()**: Notifies the preference pane that the main view is set up and prepared to be displayed.
